question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getNftAllowances()] Can an unprivileged external user supply two account.id parameters (e.g., account.id=gte:X&account.id=lte:Y) to scan a range of spender IDs for a given owner account, systematically discovering all accounts that have been granted NFT spending rights without being a party to any of those allowances?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getNftAllowances()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the absence of rate limiting on the /api/v1/accounts/{id}/allowances/nfts endpoint to perform high-volume enumeration of NFT allowances across all accounts, building a complete graph of who has authorized whom to spend their NFTs without any approval from the account owners?
